meta.title: DANKØ · Peak Time Techno · Bogotá
meta.description: DJ Dankø. Peak Time Techno, Melodic Techno and Afro House from Bogotá, Colombia. SoundCloud, tour dates and direct booking via WhatsApp.

wa.general: Hi Dankø, I’d like information about your events.
wa.ticketsFeatured: Hello, I’m interested in tickets for Dankø’s June 14, 2026 event.

shows.title: Shows
shows.lede: Live calendar — from a first party with friends to a resident in Bogotá’s scene.

bio.title: About
bio.body: Dankø is a DJ and producer with 4 years of experience. His sound is primarily focused on Peak Time Techno, combining power, precision and versatility. His artistic approach also moves between Melodic Techno and Afro House, building a progressive energy that drives the dancefloor toward peak time while maintaining a distinct identity.

journey.growth: From this stage onward, Dankø became a resident artist of Drop V Booking, maintaining a continued presence at RadioBerlin and strengthening his position within Bogotá’s electronic music scene.

gallery.lede: Booth, floor and club. Tap any image to expand.

sc.lede: Dankø’s primary platform. Sets, edits and original productions — hit play.
